text: The sleek glass, polished floors, and ambient purple-orange lighting fill me with a curious anticipation. I hear the hum of energy from the exhibit—screens flicker and phrases float through the air: "The darkness here is thick, only faintly pierced by a distant light..." These words invite me inward, toward introspection. My thoughts slow as I enter this Responsive and rapidly evolving Development space. I feel both observed and welcomed to lose myself in ideas and innovation. There’s a quiet thrill in being present where imagination and technology converge, reflecting on humanity’s place within these walls.
